fields.name: Shop Calendar Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the shop calendar that the entry of the shop calendar holiday refers to.
To select a code in the Shop Calendar table, click the field.
You must set up the shop calendar first.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date to set up as a shop calendar holiday.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of the shop calendar holiday.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending time of the shop calendar holiday.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the starting time, which are combined in a format called "starting date-time".

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the ending time, which are combined in a format called "ending date-time".

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the shop calendar holiday.
